name: Table Lamp with Woven Base and Woven Shade - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring charming design and practical style to your tabletop with the Woven Base Table Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This decorative table lamp features a woven rattan base for a neutral, boho-inspired look that goes well with any decor scheme. The dome shade with scalloped edges completes the crisp, modern look, while the on/off light setting with a rotary socket switch allows for easy use. Set this woven lamp on your side table or nightstand for a inviting glow.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
